description: Optional: MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers to extend Claude Code capabilities
note: To enable custom MCP servers, add this to ~/.claude/settings.json under 'mcpServers'

jira-mcp.description: Jira Cloud API access — query boards, sprints, issues directly

filesystem.description: Enhanced filesystem operations — already available via Bash/Read/Write/Glob

git.description: Git operations — already available via Bash

setup_steps: 2. Copy the 'jira-mcp' config block into ~/.claude/settings.json under mcpServers
3. Set JIRA_EMAIL and JIRA_API_TOKEN in environment or .env
5. MCP tools will appear alongside built-in tools
